public_notes: BRender is the first production-readiness pilot. A public source checkout matched the recorded v1.3.2 snapshot commit, exposed period make/project metadata, and now has a materializer plus successful out-of-tree CMake configure pass for a portable-core harness. The current blocker is explicit source-list reconstruction from period makefiles; no compiled output or runtime execution is claimed yet.
